/usr/bin/ar qc libquark.a CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/extensions/qplatformerbody.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/extensions/qspatialhashing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/json/json.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/polypartition/polypartition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qaabb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qangleconstraint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qareabody.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qbody.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qbroadphase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qcollision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qgizmos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qjoint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qmanifold.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qmesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qobjectpool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qparticle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qraycast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qrigidbody.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qsoftbody.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qspring.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/quarkphysics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qvector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quark.dir/include/thirdparty/QuarkPhysics/qworld.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libquark.a
